title: Move board from one folder to another
excerpt:
Hello, 
Is there a way to move board to another folder with API ?

posts.author: FTU (FTU)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Is there a way to move board to another folder with API ?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @FTU and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

As of today there is no way of doing this via API.

Let me know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias
